title: Aging & Crisis
aging_total: stress die (no botch) + ceil(age/10) − Living Conditions modifier − Longevity Ritual modifier
longevity_note: Under a Longevity Ritual, treat rolls of 10+ as 9 until age 35. A high Living Conditions / Longevity modifier means longer life (lower roll).

result_bands.result: +1 Aging Point in any Characteristic (player chooses)
CRISIS — gain enough Aging Points to reach the next Decrepitude level, then Crisis
+1 Aging Point in Str and Sta
+1 Aging Point in Dex and Qik
+1 Aging Point in Com and Pre
+1 Aging Point in Int and Per
CRISIS — gain enough Aging Points to reach the next Decrepitude level, then Crisis

aging_points_rule: Aging Points accumulate per Characteristic; when a Characteristic's Aging Points exceed |its score|, it drops by 1 and the points reset. Every Aging Point is also XP toward Decrepitude (an Ability: 5/15/30/50/75 pts → score 1/2/3/4/5).

crisis_bands.result: Minor illness — Sta stress vs EF 3 (or CrCo20) to survive
Serious illness — Sta stress vs EF 6 (or CrCo25)
Major illness — Sta stress vs EF 9 (or CrCo30)
Critical illness — Sta stress vs EF 12 (or CrCo35)
Terminal illness — CrCo40 required to survive
